message:
test(table): add 519 lines of edge-case tests for Table widget (bd-2rvwb)

Add comprehensive edge-case test coverage for the Table widget including:
- Rows with fewer cells than declared columns (empty-fill behavior)
- Zero column spacing (adjacent cell rendering)
- Additional boundary conditions for scrolling, selection state,
  header/footer interaction, and constraint resolution

These tests harden the table rendering against unusual input
combinations and document expected behavior at edge boundaries.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
